scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,green "cd comic-growth-record && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd comic-growth-record && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.typecheck: cd comic-growth-record && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../server && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.lint: cd comic-growth-record && npx eslint . && cd ../server && npx eslint .
scripts.lint:fix: cd comic-growth-record && npx eslint --fix . && cd ../server && npx eslint --fix .
